summary: Comprehensive testing of TrustClaim Enterprise Claims Processing System completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend loads correctly with minor routing issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Role-based redirect not working correctly - claimant login redirected to adjuster dashboard instead of claims portal

integration_issues.issue: Select components timeout in playwright automation (may not affect real user usage)

passed_tests: Backend API - User registration for all 3 roles (admin, adjuster, claimant)
Backend API - Claims creation and retrieval
Backend API - Claims assignment to adjusters
Backend API - Claim approval and rejection
Frontend UI - Login page loads with proper test-ids
Frontend UI - Professional design and branding
Frontend UI - Adjuster dashboard displays correct data
Frontend UI - Claims statistics showing properly ($8,300 total, 2 claims)
Frontend UI - Data integration with backend APIs
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix role-based routing in App.js - claimant users should redirect to /claims instead of /adjuster. Check useAuth context and ProtectedRoute logic for proper role-based navigation.
